pi_items.source: Generic descriptor; no authoritative mapping to strict SOC industry taxonomy.
O*NET SOC taxonomy for major group 15-0000
verifier.py checks if score >= pass_threshold, defaulting to 60.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated subset of the Chinook SQLite database, created dynamically via explicit INSERTs in setup_task.sh. The occupation metadata 'Database Administrator' exactly matches O*NET code 15-1242.00 under the 'Computer and Mathematical' major group. The verifier.py script confirms the pass_threshold of 60 out of 100 possible points across 5 distinct SQLAlchemy bug checks.
